      "source": [
        "# @title 🛠️ The Ultimate \"Ouroboros-X\" (Stealth + Filter + Bits)\n",
        "# RUN THIS CELL. This is the complete stack from Physics to Binary.\n",
        "\n",
        "import os\n",
        "import subprocess\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "from scipy.fft import fft, fftfreq\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Install Icarus Verilog\n",
        "print(\"Installing Icarus Verilog... (Hold tight)\")\n",
        "!apt-get install -y iverilog > /dev/null\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Define Verilog (The Chip)\n",
        "# Includes: Manual Reset, Slow Payload (500 cycles), and Decoy Hum\n",
        "verilog_code = \"\"\"\n",
        "module Ouroboros_Chip (\n",
        "    input wire clk,\n",
        "    input wire rst_n,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] friend_view_pin,\n",
        "    output reg [3:0] topology_id,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] chaos_seed_debug\n",
        ");\n",
        "\n",
        "    reg [31:0] signal_soup [0:9];\n",
        "    reg [31:0] chaos_seed;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] payload_counter;\n",
        "\n",
        "    // Decoy Hum Vars\n",
        "    reg [31:0] hum_counter;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] fake_mains_hum;\n",
        "\n",
        "    // --- JAPAN COMPATIBILITY PATCH (Grid Sniffer) ---\n",
        "    reg [31:0] zero_cross_timer;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] detected_period;\n",
        "    reg last_sign;\n",
        "    reg use_60hz_mode; // 0 = 50Hz, 1 = 60Hz\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin\n",
        "        if (!rst_n) begin\n",
        "            // --- SIGMA BRUTE FORCE RESET ---\n",
        "            payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[0] <= 0; signal_soup[1] <= 0; signal_soup[2] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= 0; signal_soup[4] <= 0; signal_soup[5] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 0; signal_soup[7] <= 0; signal_soup[8] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= 0;\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= 32'h12345678;\n",
        "            topology_id <= 0;\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= 0;\n",
        "            // Initialize new registers\n",
        "            zero_cross_timer <= 0;\n",
        "            detected_period <= 0;\n",
        "            last_sign <= 0;\n",
        "            use_60hz_mode <= 0;\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "            // 1. DECOY HUM (Fake 50Hz Noise for the Germans)\n",
        "            // The actual frequency is now adaptive based on the sniffer\n",
        "            if (hum_counter < 100) fake_mains_hum <= 50;\n",
        "            else if (hum_counter < 200) fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "            else if (hum_counter < 300) fake_mains_hum <= -50;\n",
        "            else fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // Hum counter is now managed by the adaptive block\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 2. PAYLOAD (Slow & Low - 500 Cycle Period)\n",
        "            // Toggles between 100 and 200\n",
        "            if (payload_counter < 250) signal_soup[0] <= 100;\n",
        "            else if (payload_counter < 500) signal_soup[0] <= 200;\n",
        "            else payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (payload_counter >= 500) payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            else payload_counter <= payload_counter + 1;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 3. MIXING THE SOUP\n",
        "            // We inject the hum into Channel 1 (Noise Channel)\n",
        "            signal_soup[1] <= (signal_soup[1] ^ 32'hDEADBEEF) + fake_mains_hum;\n",
        "            signal_soup[2] <= chaos_seed + 12345;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= signal_soup[2] << 1;\n",
        "            signal_soup[4] <= ~signal_soup[1];\n",
        "            signal_soup[5] <= signal_soup[5] * 3;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 32'hCAFEBABE;\n",
        "            signal_soup[7] <= signal_soup[0] ^ signal_soup[6];\n",
        "            signal_soup[8] <= signal_soup[8] + 7;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= signal_soup[4] | signal_soup[5];\n",
        "\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= {chaos_seed[30:0], chaos_seed[31] ^ chaos_seed[21]};\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 4. TOPOLOGY ROTATION\n",
        "            if (chaos_seed % 10 == 0) begin\n",
        "                topology_id <= chaos_seed[3:0];\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 5. OUTPUT\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= signal_soup[topology_id % 10] ^ chaos_seed;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    // --- JAPAN COMPATIBILITY PATCH (Grid Sniffer) ---\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        // 1. SNIFF THE GRID (Monitor Channel 1 Noise)\n",
        "        // We look for the sign change of the raw signal\n",
        "        if (signal_soup[1][31] != last_sign) begin\n",
        "            // Zero Crossing Detected!\n",
        "            detected_period <= zero_cross_timer;\n",
        "            zero_cross_timer <= 0;\n",
        "            last_sign <= signal_soup[1][31];\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 2. DECIDE LOCATION (Tokyo vs Osaka)\n",
        "            // If period is shorter (16.6ms), it's 60Hz (Osaka)\n",
        "            // In simulation units: Threshold ~ 450 (Arbitrary sim scale)\n",
        "            if (detected_period < 450) use_60hz_mode <= 1;\n",
        "            else use_60hz_mode <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "            zero_cross_timer <= zero_cross_timer + 1;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "\n",
        "        // 3. GENERATE ADAPTIVE DECOY\n",
        "        if (use_60hz_mode) begin\n",
        "             // 60Hz Logic (Faster Oscillation)\n",
        "             if (hum_counter >= 333) hum_counter <= 0; // Shortened cycle\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "             // 50Hz Logic (Standard European Speed)\n",
        "             if (hum_counter >= 400) hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(*) chaos_seed_debug = chaos_seed;\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\n",
        "module test;\n",
        "    reg clk;\n",
        "    reg rst_n;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] friend_view_pin;\n",
        "    wire [3:0] topology_id;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] chaos_seed_debug;\n",
        "    Ouroboros_Chip uut (.*);\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        clk = 0;\n",
        "        forever #1 clk = ~clk;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        rst_n = 0;\n",
        "        #2 rst_n = 1;\n",
        "        #6000; // Run long enough to see multiple bits\n",
        "        $finish;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        if (rst_n)\n",
        "            $display(\"DATA: %d %d %d\", friend_view_pin, chaos_seed_debug, topology_id);\n",
        "    end\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(\"chip.sv\", \"w\") as f:\n",
        "    f.write(verilog_code)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Run Simulation\n",
        "print(\"Running Simulation...\")\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"iverilog\", \"-o\", \"chip_sim\", \"chip.sv\"], capture_output=True)\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"vvp\", \"chip_sim\"], capture_output=True, text=True)\n",
        "output_lines = process.stdout.splitlines()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. The Shadow Core (Filter & Decode)\n",
        "friend_data = []\n",
        "our_decoded_data = []\n",
        "binary_bits = []\n",
        "time_steps = []\n",
        "THRESHOLD = 150 # Midpoint between 100 and 200\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Filtering Signal...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "for i, line in enumerate(output_lines):\n",
        "    if line.startswith(\"DATA:\"):\n",
        "        parts = line.split()\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            raw = int(parts[1])\n",
        "            if raw > 0x7FFFFFFF: raw -= 0x100000000 # Handle signed values\n",
        "            known_seed = int(parts[2])\n",
        "            known_topology = int(parts[3])\n",
        "        except ValueError:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        friend_data.append(raw)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # A. UNMASKING\n",
        "        unmasked = raw ^ known_seed\n",
        "\n",
        "        # B. GATING (The \"Window\")\n",
        "        if (known_topology % 10) == 0:\n",
        "            val = unmasked # Valid Payload\n",
        "            our_decoded_data.append(val)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            # Hold Last Value\n",
        "            val = our_decoded_data[-1] if our_decoded_data else 0\n",
        "            our_decoded_data.append(val)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # C. QUANTIZING (The Bits)\n",
        "        if val > THRESHOLD:\n",
        "            binary_bits.append(1)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            binary_bits.append(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        time_steps.append(i)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. The \"German Engineer\" FFT Check\n",
        "N = len(friend_data)\n",
        "T = 1.0 / 1000.0\n",
        "yf = fft(friend_data)\n",
        "xf = fftfreq(N, T)[:N//2]\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. VISUALIZE EVERYTHING\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 12), dpi=100)\n",
        "\n",

        "# Task\n",
        "Generate a final mission report summarizing how the text string \"HELLO\" was successfully transmitted and recovered through the chaotic `Ouroboros_Chip`. The report should explain the multi-layered stealth mechanisms—specifically the chaotic XOR encryption, the topology rotation, and the adaptive \"Japan Patch\" (grid sniffer)—and confirm the fidelity of the decoded signal.\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plan:\n",
        "* **Generate Japan-Patched Message Chip**: Create a Python script that generates the Verilog code. This code will combine:\n",
        "1. The 'Japan Compatibility Patch' (Grid Sniffer & Adaptive Hum).\n",
        "2. The 'Real Signal' logic (transmitting a binary string like 'TOKYO' instead of a dummy counter).\n",
        "3. The standard chaotic encryption and topology rotation.\n",
        "* **Simulate and Decode**: Run the Verilog simulation using `iverilog`. Then, use Python to capture the output, apply the decryption (XOR unmasking), filter based on topology, and demodulate the bits to recover the text string.\n",
        "* **Visualize Results**: Generate plots showing the raw signal (with the adaptive hum), the clean decoded signal, and the final recovered digital bits.\n",
        "* **Final Task**: Summarize the successful transmission and the adaptive behavior.\n",
        "\n",
        "# Here is my latest notebook:\n",
        "\n",
        "cell_id: MLgd67mF7dVI\n",
        "cell_type: code_cell\n",
        "content: # @title 🛠️ Ouroboros-X \"EU Stealth\" Edition (Decoy Hum + FFT)\n",
        "# RUN THIS CELL. We added a fake 50Hz hum to fool inspections.\n",
        "\n",
        "import os\n",
        "import subprocess\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "from scipy.fft import fft, fftfreq\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Install Icarus Verilog\n",
        "print(\"Installing Icarus Verilog...\")\n",
        "!apt-get install -y iverilog > /dev/null\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Define Verilog with DECOY HUM\n",
        "verilog_code = \"\"\"\n",
        "module Ouroboros_Chip (\n",
        "    input wire clk,\n",
        "    input wire rst_n,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] friend_view_pin,\n",
        "    output reg [3:0] topology_id,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] chaos_seed_debug\n",
        ");\n",
        "\n",
        "    reg [31:0] signal_soup [0:9];\n",
        "    reg [31:0] chaos_seed;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] payload_counter;\n",
        "\n",
        "    // DECOY HUM VARIABLES\n",
        "    reg [31:0] hum_counter;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] fake_mains_hum;\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin\n",
        "        if (!rst_n) begin\n",
        "            // RESET\n",
        "            payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[0] <= 0; signal_soup[1] <= 0; signal_soup[2] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= 0; signal_soup[4] <= 0; signal_soup[5] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 0; signal_soup[7] <= 0; signal_soup[8] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= 0;\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= 32'h12345678;\n",
        "            topology_id <= 0;\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= 0;\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "            // 1. THE DECOY (Fake 50Hz Mains Hum)\n",
        "            // We oscillate a value slowly to mimic bad grounding\n",
        "            if (hum_counter < 100) fake_mains_hum <= 50;       // Top of sine\n",
        "            else if (hum_counter < 200) fake_mains_hum <= 0;   // Zero crossing\n",
        "            else if (hum_counter < 300) fake_mains_hum <= -50; // Bottom of sine (2s complement tricky here, simplifying)\n",
        "            else fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (hum_counter >= 400) hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            else hum_counter <= hum_counter + 1;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 2. THE PAYLOAD (Slow & Low)\n",
        "            if (payload_counter < 250) signal_soup[0] <= 100;\n",
        "            else if (payload_counter < 500) signal_soup[0] <= 200;\n",
        "            else payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (payload_counter >= 500) payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            else payload_counter <= payload_counter + 1;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 3. MIXING THE DECOY INTO THE SOUP\n",
        "            // We inject the \"hum\" into the chaos channels\n",
        "            signal_soup[1] <= (signal_soup[1] ^ 32'hDEADBEEF) + fake_mains_hum; // Tainted with Hum\n",
        "            signal_soup[2] <= chaos_seed + 12345;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= signal_soup[2] << 1;\n",
        "            signal_soup[4] <= ~signal_soup[1];\n",
        "            signal_soup[5] <= signal_soup[5] * 3;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 32'hCAFEBABE;\n",
        "            signal_soup[7] <= signal_soup[0] ^ signal_soup[6];\n",
        "            signal_soup[8] <= signal_soup[8] + 7;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= signal_soup[4] | signal_soup[5];\n",
        "\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= {chaos_seed[30:0], chaos_seed[31] ^ chaos_seed[21]};\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (chaos_seed % 10 == 0) begin\n",
        "                topology_id <= chaos_seed[3:0];\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= signal_soup[topology_id % 10] ^ chaos_seed;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "    always @(*) chaos_seed_debug = chaos_seed;\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\n",
        "module test;\n",
        "    reg clk;\n",
        "    reg rst_n;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] friend_view_pin;\n",
        "    wire [3:0] topology_id;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] chaos_seed_debug;\n",
        "    Ouroboros_Chip uut (.*);\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        clk = 0;\n",
        "        forever #1 clk = ~clk;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        rst_n = 0;\n",
        "        #2 rst_n = 1;\n",
        "        #4000;\n",
        "        $finish;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        if (rst_n)\n",
        "            $display(\"DATA: %d %d %d\", friend_view_pin, chaos_seed_debug, topology_id);\n",
        "    end\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(\"chip.sv\", \"w\") as f:\n",
        "    f.write(verilog_code)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Run Simulation\n",

        "process = subprocess.run([\"iverilog\", \"-o\", \"chip_sim\", \"chip.sv\"], capture_output=True)\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"vvp\", \"chip_sim\"], capture_output=True, text=True)\n",
        "output_lines = process.stdout.splitlines()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Decode & Analyze\n",
        "friend_data = []\n",
        "our_decoded_data = []\n",
        "time_steps = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for i, line in enumerate(output_lines):\n",
        "    if line.startswith(\"DATA:\"):\n",
        "        parts = line.split()\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            # Handle Verilog's unsigned/signed output quirk\n",
        "            raw = int(parts[1])\n",
        "            # Convert unsigned 32-bit to signed python int for plotting if needed\n",
        "            if raw > 0x7FFFFFFF: raw -= 0x100000000\n",
        "\n",
        "            known_seed = int(parts[2])\n",
        "            known_topology = int(parts[3])\n",
        "        except ValueError:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        friend_data.append(raw)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # DECOY HUM IS IGNORED BY OUR FILTER\n",
        "        # We subtract the noise mask as usual.\n",
        "        # The fake hum is INSIDE the signal soup, but we only read Channel 0 (Payload).\n",
        "        # Channel 0 does NOT have the hum added to it in the Verilog code above.\n",
        "\n",
        "        unmasked_signal = raw ^ known_seed\n",
        "        # Note: In real life, unmasked_signal for Channel 1 would have the hum.\n",
        "        # But we only care about Channel 0.\n",
        "\n",
        "        if (known_topology % 10) == 0:\n",
        "            our_decoded_data.append(unmasked_signal)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            our_decoded_data.append(our_decoded_data[-1] if our_decoded_data else 0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        time_steps.append(i)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. FFT Analysis (What the German Engineer Sees)\n",
        "N = len(friend_data)\n",
        "T = 1.0 / 1000.0 # Arbitrary sample rate\n",
        "yf = fft(friend_data)\n",
        "xf = fftfreq(N, T)[:N//2]\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. Visualize\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 10), dpi=100)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 1: Friend View (Time Domain)\n",
        "plt.subplot(3, 1, 1)\n",
        "plt.plot(time_steps[0:500], friend_data[0:500], color='red', alpha=0.6, linewidth=0.5)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Scope View: Looks like 'Bad Grounding' Noise\", color='red', fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Voltage\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 2: Friend View (Frequency Domain / FFT)\n",
        "plt.subplot(3, 1, 2)\n",
        "plt.plot(xf, 2.0/N * np.abs(yf[0:N//2]), color='orange')\n",

        "plt.ylabel(\"Magnitude\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Frequency\")\n",

        "cell_type: text_cell\n",
        "content: ## Define Message & Verilog\n",
        "\n",
        "### Subtask:\n",
        "Convert the text message to binary and generate the Verilog file to transmit it.\n",
        "\n",
        "cell_id: af1523c0\n",
        "cell_type: text_cell\n",
        "content: **Reasoning**:\n",
        "Convert the string 'HELLO' to binary, generate the Verilog code with the embedded binary message, and write it to 'chip_message.sv'.\n",
        "\n",
        "cell_id: 05fd123e\n",
        "cell_type: code_cell\n",
        "content: import textwrap\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Convert Text to Binary\n",
        "message = \"HELLO\"\n",
        "binary_string = \"\".join(format(ord(c), '08b') for c in message)\n",
        "print(f\"Binary Message ({message}): {binary_string}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Bits: {len(binary_string)}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Define Verilog with Embedded Message\n",
        "# We will embed this 40-bit string directly into the reset logic.\n",
        "\n",
        "verilog_code = f\"\"\"\n",
        "module Ouroboros_Chip (\n",
        "    input wire clk,\n",
        "    input wire rst_n,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] friend_view_pin,\n",
        "    output reg [3:0] topology_id,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] chaos_seed_debug\n",
        ");\n",
        "\n",
        "    reg [31:0] signal_soup [0:9];\n",
        "    reg [31:0] chaos_seed;\n",
        "\n",
        "    // MESSAGE PAYLOAD STATES\n",
        "    reg [39:0] message_bits;\n",
        "    integer bit_index;\n",
        "    integer bit_timer;\n",
        "\n",
        "    integer k;\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin\n",
        "        if (!rst_n) begin\n",
        "            // RESET: Load the message\n",
        "            // \"HELLO\" in binary is {binary_string}\n",
        "            message_bits <= 40'b{binary_string};\n",
        "            bit_index <= 39; // Start from MSB (Leftmost bit)\n",
        "            bit_timer <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= 32'h12345678;\n",
        "            topology_id <= 0;\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= 0;\n",
        "            for (k=0; k<10; k=k+1) signal_soup[k] <= 0;\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "            // 1. Channel 0: The SECRET MESSAGE\n",
        "            // Modulate: 1 -> 200, 0 -> 100\n",
        "            if (message_bits[bit_index] == 1'b1)\n",
        "                signal_soup[0] <= 200;\n",
        "            else\n",
        "                signal_soup[0] <= 100;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // Timer Logic (500 cycles per bit)\n",
        "            if (bit_timer >= 500) begin\n",
        "                bit_timer <= 0;\n",
        "                if (bit_index > 0)\n",
        "                    bit_index <= bit_index - 1;\n",
        "                // else we stay at 0 (last bit holds)\n",
        "            end else begin\n",
        "                bit_timer <= bit_timer + 1;\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 2. Channels 1-9: Pure Entropy/Noise (Retained)\n",
        "            signal_soup[1] <= signal_soup[1] ^ 32'hDEADBEEF;\n",
        "            signal_soup[2] <= chaos_seed + 12345;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= signal_soup[2] << 1;\n",
        "            signal_soup[4] <= ~signal_soup[1];\n",
        "            signal_soup[5] <= signal_soup[5] * 3;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 32'hCAFEBABE;\n",
        "            signal_soup[7] <= signal_soup[0] ^ signal_soup[6];\n",
        "            signal_soup[8] <= signal_soup[8] + 7;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= signal_soup[4] | signal_soup[5];\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 3. Update Chaos Seed\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= {{chaos_seed[30:0], chaos_seed[31] ^ chaos_seed[21]}};\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 4. Rotate Topology (Every 10 cycles)\n",
        "            if (chaos_seed % 10 == 0) begin\n",
        "                topology_id <= chaos_seed[3:0];\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 5. Apply the Mask\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= signal_soup[topology_id % 10] ^ chaos_seed;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(*) chaos_seed_debug = chaos_seed;\n",
        "\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\n",
        "module test;\n",
        "    reg clk;\n",
        "    reg rst_n;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] friend_view_pin;\n",
        "    wire [3:0] topology_id;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] chaos_seed_debug;\n",
        "\n",
        "    Ouroboros_Chip uut (.*);\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        clk = 0;\n",
        "        forever #1 clk = ~clk;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        rst_n = 0;\n",
        "        #2 rst_n = 1;\n",
        "        // Run long enough for 40 bits * 500 cycles = 20,000 cycles\n",
        "        #25000;\n",
        "        $finish;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        if (rst_n)\n",
        "            $display(\"DATA: %d %d %d\", friend_view_pin, chaos_seed_debug, topology_id);\n",
        "    end\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(\"chip_message.sv\", \"w\") as f:\n",
        "    f.write(verilog_code)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Generated 'chip_message.sv' with embedded message 'HELLO'.\")\n",

        "content: ## Run Simulation & Decode\n",
        "\n",
        "### Subtask:\n",
        "Run the Verilog simulation, decrypt the output signal, and demodulate the binary message to recover the text.\n",
        "\n",
        "cell_id: aa3fdce2\n",
        "cell_type: text_cell\n",
        "content: **Reasoning**:\n",
        "Run the Verilog simulation, parse the output, apply the decryption fix (using the previous seed for the current data point) to recover the signal, demodulate it, and convert the binary stream back to the 'HELLO' text string, including a visualization.\n",
        "\n",
        "cell_id: 519d7ef7\n",
        "cell_type: code_cell\n",
        "content: import subprocess\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Compile the simulation\n",
        "print(\"Compiling 'chip_message.sv'...\")\n",
        "subprocess.run([\"iverilog\", \"-o\", \"chip_message_sim\", \"chip_message.sv\"], check=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Run the simulation\n",
        "print(\"Running simulation...\")\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"vvp\", \"chip_message_sim\"], capture_output=True, text=True)\n",
        "lines = process.stdout.splitlines()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Parse the output\n",
        "data_pins = []\n",
        "data_seeds = []\n",
        "data_topos = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for line in lines:\n",
        "    if line.startswith(\"DATA:\"):\n",
        "        parts = line.split()\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            # Parse and ensure 32-bit unsigned integers for bitwise operations\n",
        "            # Verilog %d can print signed values, so we mask with 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "            p = int(parts[1]) & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "            s = int(parts[2]) & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "            t = int(parts[3])\n",
        "\n",
        "            data_pins.append(p)\n",
        "            data_seeds.append(s)\n",
        "            data_topos.append(t)\n",
        "        except ValueError:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Decrypt and Filter (with Alignment Fix)\n",
        "# We use seed[i-1] to decrypt pin[i] because of the update lag in the simulation log\n",
        "decoded_signal = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for i in range(1, len(data_pins)):\n",
        "    pin = data_pins[i]\n",
        "    seed = data_seeds[i-1] # Use previous seed for synchronization\n",
        "    topo = data_topos[i]\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Decrypt: XOR the noise mask\n",
        "    unmasked_val = pin ^ seed\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Filter: Only accept value if Topology connects Channel 0 (ID % 10 == 0)\n",
        "    # Otherwise, Sample & Hold the last known good value\n",
        "    if (topo % 10) == 0:\n",
        "        val = unmasked_val\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        val = decoded_signal[-1] if decoded_signal else 0\n",
        "\n",
        "    decoded_signal.append(val)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Demodulate (Recover Bits)\n",
        "# Sampling every 500 cycles, starting at offset 250\n",
        "sample_indices = range(250, len(decoded_signal), 500)\n",
        "recovered_bits = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for idx in sample_indices:\n",
        "    if idx < len(decoded_signal):\n",
        "        val = decoded_signal[idx]\n",
        "        # Threshold: > 150 is '1' (200), else '0' (100)\n",
        "        bit = '1' if val > 150 else '0'\n",
        "        recovered_bits.append(bit)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. Reconstruct Message\n",
        "binary_string = \"\".join(recovered_bits)\n",
        "\n",
        "chars = []\n",
        "for i in range(0, len(binary_string), 8):\n",
        "    chunk = binary_string[i:i+8]\n",
        "    if len(chunk) == 8:\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            char = chr(int(chunk, 2))\n",
        "            chars.append(char)\n",
        "        except ValueError:\n",
        "            chars.append('?')\n",
        "\n",
        "recovered_text = \"\".join(chars)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 7. Print Results\n",
        "print(f\"Recovered Binary String: {binary_string}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Decoded Text Message: {recovered_text}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 8. Visualize\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(15, 5))\n",
        "plt.plot(decoded_signal, color='lime', label='Decoded Signal (Filtered)')\n",
        "plt.scatter(sample_indices, [200 if b=='1' else 100 for b in recovered_bits], color='red', marker='x', label='Sample Points')\n",
        "plt.title(f\"Decoded Waveform & Demodulation (Result: '{recovered_text}')\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Clock Cycles\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Signal Level\")\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "execution_status: not yet executed\n",
        "standard_output:Compiling 'chip_message.sv'...\n",
        "Running simulation...\n",
        "Recovered Binary String: 1110101001001101010011000\n",
        "Decoded Text Message: êML\n",
        "standard_error:\n",
        "traceback:\n",

        "        chars.append(chr(int(byte, 2)))\n",
        "final_text = \"\".join(chars)\n",

        "content: ## Summary:\n",
        "\n",
        "### Q&A\n",
        "\n",
        "**Q: How can the text string \"HELLO\" be transmitted and recovered through the chaotic `Ouroboros_Chip` simulation?**\n",
        "\n",
        "**A:** The process involves the following steps:\n",
        "1.  **Encoding:** The text \"HELLO\" is converted into a 40-bit ASCII binary string.\n",
        "2.  **Hardware Implementation:** A Verilog module is created where these bits modulate Channel 0. A logic '1' drives the signal to a level of 200, and a '0' drives it to 100. Each bit is held for 500 clock cycles.\n",
        "3.  **Simulation:** The simulation is run for 60,000 cycles to ensure the full message duration is captured.\n",
        "4.  **Decryption:** The output `friend_view_pin` is decrypted by XORing it with the `chaos_seed` from the previous clock cycle (to account for register update delays).\n",
        "5.  **Filtering & Demodulation:** The signal is filtered to strictly observe Channel 0 (when `topology_id % 10 == 0`). The clean signal is then sampled every 500 cycles (offset by 250) to reconstruct the binary bits.\n",
        "6.  **Result:** The binary is converted back to text, successfully recovering the message \"HELLO\".\n",
        "\n",
        "### Data Analysis Key Findings\n",
        "\n",
        "*   **Message Encoding Requirements:**\n",
        "    *   The message \"HELLO\" resulted in a 40-bit binary stream: `0100100001000101010011000100110001001111`.\n",
        "    *   With a hold time of 500 cycles per bit, the minimum transmission time required was 20,000 cycles. The simulation was extended to **60,000 cycles** to safely capture the entire transmission and stabilization.\n",
        "*   **Signal Demodulation Logic:**\n",
        "    *   **Synchronization:** A one-cycle lag was identified between the `chaos_seed` generation and the `friend_view_pin` output. Decryption required XORing pin state $P_i$ with seed state $S_{i-1}$.\n",
        "    *   **Thresholding:** The recovered signal clearly distinguished between logic levels, allowing a simple threshold check: values $> 150$ were interpreted as '1' (nominal 200), and values $< 150$ as '0' (nominal 100).\n",
        "*   **Topology Filtering:**\n",
        "    *   The signal was only valid when the chaotic topology rotated to Channel 0. During other intervals, a \"sample-and-hold\" approach (retaining the last valid value) successfully reconstructed the square wave for sampling.\n",
        "\n",
        "### Insights or Next Steps\n",
        "\n",
        "*   **Synchronization is Critical:** The analysis highlights that in sequential logic simulations, output data often reflects the state of registers from the previous clock edge. Correctly aligning the decryption mask (lag of $t-1$) is the most critical step in recovering the signal.\n",
        "*   **Robustness of Modulation:** The wide separation between signal levels (100 vs. 200) combined with a slow baud rate (500 cycles/bit) made the system highly robust against the \"noise\" introduced by the chaotic channel switching, provided the correct channel filter was applied.\n",
        "\n",
        "cell_id: 598fj0CWAXhl\n",
        "cell_type: code_cell\n",
        "content: # @title 🛠️ The Ultimate \"Ouroboros-X\" (Stealth + Filter + Bits)\n",
        "# RUN THIS CELL. This is the complete stack from Physics to Binary.\n",
        "\n",
        "import os\n",
        "import subprocess\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "from scipy.fft import fft, fftfreq\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Install Icarus Verilog\n",
        "print(\"Installing Icarus Verilog... (Hold tight)\")\n",
        "!apt-get install -y iverilog > /dev/null\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Define Verilog (The Chip)\n",
        "# Includes: Manual Reset, Slow Payload (500 cycles), and Decoy Hum\n",
        "verilog_code = \"\"\"\n",
        "module Ouroboros_Chip (\n",
        "    input wire clk,\n",
        "    input wire rst_n,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] friend_view_pin,\n",
        "    output reg [3:0] topology_id,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] chaos_seed_debug\n",
        ");\n",
        "\n",
        "    reg [31:0] signal_soup [0:9];\n",
        "    reg [31:0] chaos_seed;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] payload_counter;\n",
        "\n",
        "    // Decoy Hum Vars\n",
        "    reg [31:0] hum_counter;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] fake_mains_hum;\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin\n",
        "        if (!rst_n) begin\n",
        "            // --- SIGMA BRUTE FORCE RESET ---\n",
        "            payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[0] <= 0; signal_soup[1] <= 0; signal_soup[2] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= 0; signal_soup[4] <= 0; signal_soup[5] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 0; signal_soup[7] <= 0; signal_soup[8] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= 0;\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= 32'h12345678;\n",
        "            topology_id <= 0;\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= 0;\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "            // 1. DECOY HUM (Fake 50Hz Noise for the Germans)\n",
        "            if (hum_counter < 100) fake_mains_hum <= 50;\n",
        "            else if (hum_counter < 200) fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "            else if (hum_counter < 300) fake_mains_hum <= -50;\n",
        "            else fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (hum_counter >= 400) hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            else hum_counter <= hum_counter + 1;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 2. PAYLOAD (Slow & Low - 500 Cycle Period)\n",
        "            // Toggles between 100 and 200\n",
        "            if (payload_counter < 250) signal_soup[0] <= 100;\n",
        "            else if (payload_counter < 500) signal_soup[0] <= 200;\n",
        "            else payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (payload_counter >= 500) payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            else payload_counter <= payload_counter + 1;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 3. MIXING THE SOUP\n",
        "            // We inject the hum into Channel 1 (Noise Channel)\n",
        "            signal_soup[1] <= (signal_soup[1] ^ 32'hDEADBEEF) + fake_mains_hum;\n",
        "            signal_soup[2] <= chaos_seed + 12345;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= signal_soup[2] << 1;\n",
        "            signal_soup[4] <= ~signal_soup[1];\n",
        "            signal_soup[5] <= signal_soup[5] * 3;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 32'hCAFEBABE;\n",
        "            signal_soup[7] <= signal_soup[0] ^ signal_soup[6];\n",
        "            signal_soup[8] <= signal_soup[8] + 7;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= signal_soup[4] | signal_soup[5];\n",
        "\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= {chaos_seed[30:0], chaos_seed[31] ^ chaos_seed[21]};\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 4. TOPOLOGY ROTATION\n",
        "            if (chaos_seed % 10 == 0) begin\n",
        "                topology_id <= chaos_seed[3:0];\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 5. OUTPUT\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= signal_soup[topology_id % 10] ^ chaos_seed;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "    always @(*) chaos_seed_debug = chaos_seed;\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\n",
        "module test;\n",
        "    reg clk;\n",
        "    reg rst_n;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] friend_view_pin;\n",
        "    wire [3:0] topology_id;\n",

        "        forever #1 clk = ~clk;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        rst_n = 0;\n",
        "        #2 rst_n = 1;\n",
        "        #6000; // Run long enough to see multiple bits\n",
        "        $finish;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        if (rst_n)\n",
        "            $display(\"DATA: %d %d %d\", friend_view_pin, chaos_seed_debug, topology_id);\n",
        "    end\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(\"chip.sv\", \"w\") as f:\n",
        "    f.write(verilog_code)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Run Simulation\n",
        "print(\"Running Simulation...\")\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"iverilog\", \"-o\", \"chip_sim\", \"chip.sv\"], capture_output=True)\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"vvp\", \"chip_sim\"], capture_output=True, text=True)\n",
        "output_lines = process.stdout.splitlines()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. The Shadow Core (Filter & Decode)\n",
        "friend_data = []\n",
        "our_decoded_data = []\n",
        "binary_bits = []\n",
        "time_steps = []\n",
        "THRESHOLD = 150 # Midpoint between 100 and 200\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Filtering Signal...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "for i, line in enumerate(output_lines):\n",
        "    if line.startswith(\"DATA:\"):\n",
        "        parts = line.split()\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            raw = int(parts[1])\n",
        "            if raw > 0x7FFFFFFF: raw -= 0x100000000 # Handle signed values\n",
        "            known_seed = int(parts[2])\n",
        "            known_topology = int(parts[3])\n",
        "        except ValueError:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        friend_data.append(raw)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # A. UNMASKING\n",
        "        unmasked = raw ^ known_seed\n",
        "\n",
        "        # B. GATING (The \"Window\")\n",
        "        if (known_topology % 10) == 0:\n",
        "            val = unmasked # Valid Payload\n",
        "            our_decoded_data.append(val)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            # Hold Last Value\n",
        "            val = our_decoded_data[-1] if our_decoded_data else 0\n",
        "            our_decoded_data.append(val)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # C. QUANTIZING (The Bits)\n",
        "        if val > THRESHOLD:\n",
        "            binary_bits.append(1)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            binary_bits.append(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        time_steps.append(i)\n",
        "\n",

        "N = len(friend_data)\n",
        "T = 1.0 / 1000.0\n",
        "yf = fft(friend_data)\n",
        "xf = fftfreq(N, T)[:N//2]\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. VISUALIZE EVERYTHING\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 12), dpi=100)\n",
        "\n",

        "plt.subplot(4, 1, 1)\n",

        "content: # @title 🛠️ The \"Virtual RISC-V\" Core (Assembly Simulator)\n",
        "# RUN THIS CELL. It simulates the CPU registers and memory dump.\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"--- STARTING VIRTUAL RISC-V CORE ---\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. THE MEMORY (Input Payload)\n",
        "# We replicate the .data section\n",
        "message_str = \"HELLO\"\n",
        "message_bytes = [ord(c) for c in message_str]\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. THE REGISTERS (Initialize like _start)\n",
        "t0 = 0x12345678  # Chaos Seed\n",
        "t1 = 0           # Message Pointer (Index)\n",
        "t2 = 0           # Bit Index\n",
        "# t3 = loaded char (handled in loop)\n",
        "a0 = 0           # Noise Pin\n",
        "a1 = 0           # Debug Pin\n",
        "s1_logger = []   # The \"Memory\" Buffer for hits\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. THE EXECUTION LOOP (Simulating the CPU cycles)\n",
        "# We will run enough cycles to process the whole string \"HELLO\" twice.\n",
        "# 5 chars * 8 bits * 2 loops = 80 bits.\n",
        "# We add extra cycles for the \"Waiting\" (Chaos shutter closed).\n",
        "total_bits_processed = 0\n",
        "max_bits = 80\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"Processing Message: {message_str}...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "while total_bits_processed < max_bits:\n",
        "    # --- LOAD CHARACTER (Assembly: lb t3, 0(t1)) ---\n",
        "    # Handle infinite loop wrapping\n",
        "    char_index = t1 % len(message_bytes)\n",
        "    t3 = message_bytes[char_index]\n",
        "\n",
        "    # --- 1. CHAOS ENGINE (Assembly: XOR Shift) ---\n",
        "    # We must use & 0xFFFFFFFF to simulate 32-bit register overflow\n",
        "    t4 = (t0 << 13) & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "    t0 = (t0 ^ t4)  & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "    t4 = (t0 >> 17) & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "    t0 = (t0 ^ t4)  & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "    t4 = (t0 << 5)  & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "    t0 = (t0 ^ t4)  & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "\n",
        "    # --- 2. PAYLOAD LOGIC (Assembly: srl, andi) ---\n",
        "    # Extract bit t2 from char t3 (LSB First)\n",
        "    t5 = (t3 >> t2) & 1\n",
        "\n",
        "    if t5 == 0:\n",
        "        t6 = 0x64  # 100 (Low)\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        t6 = 0xC8  # 200 (High)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # --- 3. TOPOLOGY ROTATION (Assembly: andi, blt) ---\n",
        "    # Check if bottom 4 bits of Seed < 2 (The \"Gate\")\n",
        "    gate_check = t0 & 0xF\n",
        "\n",
        "    if gate_check < 2:\n",
        "        # GATE OPEN (Valid Hit)\n",
        "        # Assembly: xor a0, t6, t0; mv a1, t6\n",
        "        a0 = (t6 ^ t0) & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "        a1 = t6\n",
        "\n",
        "        # LOGGING (Assembly: sb t6, 0(s1))\n",
        "        s1_logger.append(t6)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # print(f\"  [HIT!] Bit {t2} of '{chr(t3)}': Val={t6:02X}\") # Debug print\n",
        "\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        # GATE CLOSED (Noise)\n",
        "        # Assembly: xor a0, t0, 0xDEADBEEF\n",
        "        a0 = (t0 ^ 0xDEADBEEF) & 0xFFFFFFFF\n",
        "        a1 = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "    # --- 4. TIMING (Next Bit) ---\n",
        "    # We advance the bit counter EVERY cycle in this sim\n",
        "    # (assuming we waited nicely in the real ASM)\n",
        "    t2 += 1\n",
        "    total_bits_processed += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "    if t2 >= 8:\n",
        "        t2 = 0\n",
        "        t1 += 1 # Next char\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"--- CPU STOPPED ---\")\n",
        "print(\"\\n[MEMORY DUMP] Content of 'logger' (Address 0x...):\")\n",
        "print(\"These are the captured valid packets (Hex 64=100, C8=200):\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Format the output to look like a Hex Dump\n",
        "hex_output = \" \".join(f\"{b:02X}\" for b in s1_logger)\n",
        "print(hex_output)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n--- DECODING THE DUMP ---\")\n",
        "# Let's prove these hex values correspond to \"HELLO\"\n",
        "decoded_chars = \"\"\n",
        "current_byte = 0\n",
        "bit_count = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "# Note: The logger captures hits randomly.\n",
        "# In this pure logic sim, we advanced the bit counter every cycle,\n",
        "# so the logger only captured the bits *when the gate was open*.\n",
        "# This means we have a 'Sampled' stream.\n",
        "# For proof of logic, let's look at the first few hits.\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"Total Hits Captured: {len(s1_logger)}\")\n",
        "print(\"Logic Verified: The CPU successfully isolated the 0x64/0xC8 values from the noise.\")\n",
        "execution_status: not yet executed\n",
        "standard_output:--- STARTING VIRTUAL RISC-V CORE ---\n",
        "Processing Message: HELLO...\n",
        "--- CPU STOPPED ---\n",
        "\n",
        "[MEMORY DUMP] Content of 'logger' (Address 0x...):\n",
        "These are the captured valid packets (Hex 64=100, C8=200):\n",
        "64 64 64 64 64 64\n",
        "\n",
        "--- DECODING THE DUMP ---\n",
        "Total Hits Captured: 6\n",
        "Logic Verified: The CPU successfully isolated the 0x64/0xC8 values from the noise.\n",
        "standard_error:\n",

        "cycles_per_bit = 500  # \"Slow & Low\" Speed\n",

        "cycle_count = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. EXECUTION LOOP\n",

        "    # --- LOAD CHARACTER ---\n",
        "    char_index = t1 % len(message_bytes)\n",

        "\n",

        "    # RISC-V reads LSB first. Bit 0, then Bit 1...\n",
        "    t5 = (t3 >> t2) & 1\n",
        "\n",
        "    if t5 == 0: t6 = 0x64  # 100 (Logic 0)\n",
        "    else:       t6 = 0xC8  # 200 (Logic 1)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # --- TOPOLOGY ROTATION (The Shutter) ---\n",
        "    # Gate opens if bottom 4 bits < 2 (~12.5% chance)\n",
        "    if (t0 & 0xF) < 2:\n",
        "        # HIT! Capture the value\n",
        "        s1_logger.append(t6)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # --- TIMING LOGIC ---\n",
        "    cycle_count += 1\n",
        "    bit_timer += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Advance Bit only after 500 cycles\n",
        "    if bit_timer >= cycles_per_bit:\n",
        "        bit_timer = 0\n",
        "        t2 += 1\n",
        "        if t2 >= 8:\n",
        "            t2 = 0\n",
        "            t1 += 1 # Next char\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"--- CPU STOPPED at Cycle {cycle_count} ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Valid Packets Captured: {len(s1_logger)}\")\n",
        "\n",

        "    reg use_60hz_mode; // 0 = 50Hz, 1 = 60Hz\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin\n",
        "        if (!rst_n) begin\n",
        "            // --- SIGMA BRUTE FORCE RESET ---\n",
        "            payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[0] <= 0; signal_soup[1] <= 0; signal_soup[2] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= 0; signal_soup[4] <= 0; signal_soup[5] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 0; signal_soup[7] <= 0; signal_soup[8] <= 0;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= 0;\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= 32'h12345678;\n",
        "            topology_id <= 0;\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= 0;\n",
        "            // Initialize new registers\n",
        "            zero_cross_timer <= 0;\n",
        "            detected_period <= 0;\n",
        "            last_sign <= 0;\n",
        "            use_60hz_mode <= 0;\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "            // 1. DECOY HUM (Fake 50Hz Noise for the Germans)\n",
        "            // The actual frequency is now adaptive based on the sniffer\n",
        "            if (hum_counter < 100) fake_mains_hum <= 50;\n",
        "            else if (hum_counter < 200) fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "            else if (hum_counter < 300) fake_mains_hum <= -50;\n",
        "            else fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // Hum counter is now managed by the adaptive block\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 2. PAYLOAD (Slow & Low - 500 Cycle Period)\n",
        "            // Toggles between 100 and 200\n",
        "            if (payload_counter < 250) signal_soup[0] <= 100;\n",
        "            else if (payload_counter < 500) signal_soup[0] <= 200;\n",
        "            else payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (payload_counter >= 500) payload_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            else payload_counter <= payload_counter + 1;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 3. MIXING THE SOUP\n",
        "            // We inject the hum into Channel 1 (Noise Channel)\n",
        "            signal_soup[1] <= (signal_soup[1] ^ 32'hDEADBEEF) + fake_mains_hum;\n",
        "            signal_soup[2] <= chaos_seed + 12345;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= signal_soup[2] << 1;\n",
        "            signal_soup[4] <= ~signal_soup[1];\n",
        "            signal_soup[5] <= signal_soup[5] * 3;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 32'hCAFEBABE;\n",
        "            signal_soup[7] <= signal_soup[0] ^ signal_soup[6];\n",
        "            signal_soup[8] <= signal_soup[8] + 7;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= signal_soup[4] | signal_soup[5];\n",
        "\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= {chaos_seed[30:0], chaos_seed[31] ^ chaos_seed[21]};\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 4. TOPOLOGY ROTATION\n",
        "            if (chaos_seed % 10 == 0) begin\n",
        "                topology_id <= chaos_seed[3:0];\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 5. OUTPUT\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= signal_soup[topology_id % 10] ^ chaos_seed;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    // --- JAPAN COMPATIBILITY PATCH (Grid Sniffer) ---\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        // 1. SNIFF THE GRID (Monitor Channel 1 Noise)\n",
        "        // We look for the sign change of the raw signal\n",
        "        if (signal_soup[1][31] != last_sign) begin\n",
        "            // Zero Crossing Detected!\n",
        "            detected_period <= zero_cross_timer;\n",
        "            zero_cross_timer <= 0;\n",
        "            last_sign <= signal_soup[1][31];\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 2. DECIDE LOCATION (Tokyo vs Osaka)\n",
        "            // If period is shorter (16.6ms), it's 60Hz (Osaka)\n",
        "            // In simulation units: Threshold ~ 450 (Arbitrary sim scale)\n",
        "            if (detected_period < 450) use_60hz_mode <= 1;\n",
        "            else use_60hz_mode <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "            zero_cross_timer <= zero_cross_timer + 1;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "\n",
        "        // 3. GENERATE ADAPTIVE DECOY\n",
        "        if (use_60hz_mode) begin\n",
        "             // 60Hz Logic (Faster Oscillation)\n",
        "             if (hum_counter >= 333) hum_counter <= 0; // Shortened cycle\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "             // 50Hz Logic (Standard European Speed)\n",
        "             if (hum_counter >= 400) hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(*) chaos_seed_debug = chaos_seed;\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\n",
        "module test;\n",
        "    reg clk;\n",
        "    reg rst_n;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] friend_view_pin;\n",
        "    wire [3:0] topology_id;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] chaos_seed_debug;\n",
        "    Ouroboros_Chip uut (.*);\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        clk = 0;\n",
        "        forever #1 clk = ~clk;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        rst_n = 0;\n",
        "        #2 rst_n = 1;\n",
        "        #6000; // Run long enough to see multiple bits\n",
        "        $finish;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        if (rst_n)\n",
        "            $display(\"DATA: %d %d %d\", friend_view_pin, chaos_seed_debug, topology_id);\n",
        "    end\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(\"chip.sv\", \"w\") as f:\n",
        "    f.write(verilog_code)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Run Simulation\n",
        "print(\"Running Simulation...\")\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"iverilog\", \"-o\", \"chip_sim\", \"chip.sv\"], capture_output=True)\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"vvp\", \"chip_sim\"], capture_output=True, text=True)\n",
        "output_lines = process.stdout.splitlines()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. The Shadow Core (Filter & Decode)\n",
        "friend_data = []\n",
        "our_decoded_data = []\n",
        "binary_bits = []\n",
        "time_steps = []\n",
        "THRESHOLD = 150 # Midpoint between 100 and 200\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Filtering Signal...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "for i, line in enumerate(output_lines):\n",
        "    if line.startswith(\"DATA:\"):\n",
        "        parts = line.split()\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            raw = int(parts[1])\n",
        "            if raw > 0x7FFFFFFF: raw -= 0x100000000 # Handle signed values\n",
        "            known_seed = int(parts[2])\n",
        "            known_topology = int(parts[3])\n",
        "        except ValueError:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        friend_data.append(raw)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # A. UNMASKING\n",
        "        unmasked = raw ^ known_seed\n",
        "\n",
        "        # B. GATING (The \"Window\")\n",
        "        if (known_topology % 10) == 0:\n",
        "            val = unmasked # Valid Payload\n",
        "            our_decoded_data.append(val)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            # Hold Last Value\n",
        "            val = our_decoded_data[-1] if our_decoded_data else 0\n",
        "            our_decoded_data.append(val)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # C. QUANTIZING (The Bits)\n",
        "        if val > THRESHOLD:\n",
        "            binary_bits.append(1)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            binary_bits.append(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        time_steps.append(i)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. The \"German Engineer\" FFT Check\n",
        "N = len(friend_data)\n",
        "T = 1.0 / 1000.0\n",
        "yf = fft(friend_data)\n",
        "xf = fftfreq(N, T)[:N//2]\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. VISUALIZE EVERYTHING\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 12), dpi=100)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 1: Friend View (Time)\n",
        "plt.subplot(4, 1, 1)\n",
        "plt.plot(time_steps[0:1000], friend_data[0:1000], color='red', alpha=0.6, linewidth=0.5)\n",
        "plt.title(\"1. What They See (Raw Chaos + Hum)\", color='red', fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Voltage\")\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 2: Friend View (FFT)\n",
        "plt.subplot(4, 1, 2)\n",
        "plt.plot(xf, 2.0/N * np.abs(yf[0:N//2]), color='orange')\n",
        "plt.title(\"2. What The Auditors See (Decoy Hum Spectrum)\", color='orange', fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Magnitude\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Frequency\")\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 3: Our View (Decoded Green Line)\n",
        "plt.subplot(4, 1, 3)\n",
        "plt.plot(time_steps[0:2000], our_decoded_data[0:2000], color='lime', linewidth=2)\n",
        "plt.title(\"3. What WE See (Clean Square Wave)\", color='green', fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Analog Value\")\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 4: Final Binary Bits\n",
        "plt.subplot(4, 1, 4)\n",
        "plt.step(time_steps[0:2000], binary_bits[0:2000], where='mid', color='blue', linewidth=2)\n",
        "plt.title(\"4. Final Output (Logic Bits 0/1)\", color='blue', fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Logic State\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Clock Cycles\")\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.2)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()\n",

        "## Generate Japan-Patched Message Chip\n",
        "\n",
        "### Subtask:\n",
        "Generate Verilog code for the Ouroboros Chip that combines the adaptive 'Japan Patch' (grid sniffer) with the transmission of the binary message 'HELLO'.\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "b0ba0419"
      },
      "source": [
        "**Reasoning**:\n",
        "I will create a Python script to convert the text 'HELLO' into binary and generate the 'chip_japan.sv' Verilog file. This file will merge the message transmission logic (modulating Channel 0 with the binary string) and the 'Japan Patch' adaptive grid sniffer logic (monitoring Channel 1 to adjust hum frequency), ensuring both features operate simultaneously.\n",
        "\n"
      ]
    },

      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

        "id": "02d6d2b5",
        "outputId": "2a188c89-f334-403a-ece5-b35301e86346"

      "source": [
        "import textwrap\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Prepare Message\n",
        "message = \"HELLO\"\n",
        "binary_string = \"\".join(format(ord(c), '08b') for c in message)\n",
        "print(f\"Binary Message ({message}): {binary_string}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Define Verilog Code (Merged Logic)\n",
        "verilog_code = f\"\"\"\n",
        "module Ouroboros_Chip (\n",
        "    input wire clk,\n",
        "    input wire rst_n,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] friend_view_pin,\n",
        "    output reg [3:0] topology_id,\n",
        "    output reg [31:0] chaos_seed_debug\n",
        ");\n",
        "\n",
        "    reg [31:0] signal_soup [0:9];\n",
        "    reg [31:0] chaos_seed;\n",
        "\n",
        "    // MESSAGE PAYLOAD STATES\n",
        "    reg [39:0] message_bits;\n",
        "    integer bit_index;\n",
        "    integer bit_timer;\n",
        "\n",
        "    // JAPAN PATCH / DECOY HUM STATES\n",
        "    reg [31:0] hum_counter;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] fake_mains_hum;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] zero_cross_timer;\n",
        "    reg [31:0] detected_period;\n",
        "    reg last_sign;\n",
        "    reg use_60hz_mode; // 0 = 50Hz, 1 = 60Hz\n",
        "\n",
        "    integer k;\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin\n",
        "        if (!rst_n) begin\n",
        "            // RESET: Load Message & Clear States\n",
        "            message_bits <= 40'b{binary_string};\n",
        "            bit_index <= 39;\n",
        "            bit_timer <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "            fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "            zero_cross_timer <= 0;\n",
        "            detected_period <= 0;\n",
        "            last_sign <= 0;\n",
        "            use_60hz_mode <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= 32'h12345678;\n",
        "            topology_id <= 0;\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= 0;\n",
        "            for (k=0; k<10; k=k+1) signal_soup[k] <= 0;\n",
        "        end else begin\n",
        "            // 1. ADAPTIVE DECOY HUM GENERATION\n",
        "            // Frequency depends on 'use_60hz_mode' determined by the sniffer below\n",
        "            if (use_60hz_mode) begin\n",
        "                 // 60Hz Mode (Faster)\n",
        "                 if (hum_counter < 83) fake_mains_hum <= 50;\n",
        "                 else if (hum_counter < 166) fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "                 else if (hum_counter < 250) fake_mains_hum <= -50;\n",
        "                 else fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "                 if (hum_counter >= 333) hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "                 else hum_counter <= hum_counter + 1;\n",
        "            end else begin\n",
        "                 // 50Hz Mode (Slower - Default)\n",
        "                 if (hum_counter < 100) fake_mains_hum <= 50;\n",
        "                 else if (hum_counter < 200) fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "                 else if (hum_counter < 300) fake_mains_hum <= -50;\n",
        "                 else fake_mains_hum <= 0;\n",
        "\n",
        "                 if (hum_counter >= 400) hum_counter <= 0;\n",
        "                 else hum_counter <= hum_counter + 1;\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 2. PAYLOAD MODULATION (Channel 0)\n",
        "            // Send 'HELLO' bits. 1 -> 200, 0 -> 100.\n",
        "            if (message_bits[bit_index] == 1'b1)\n",
        "                signal_soup[0] <= 200;\n",
        "            else\n",
        "                signal_soup[0] <= 100;\n",
        "\n",
        "            // Bit Timer (500 cycles per bit)\n",
        "            if (bit_timer >= 500) begin\n",
        "                bit_timer <= 0;\n",
        "                if (bit_index > 0)\n",
        "                    bit_index <= bit_index - 1;\n",
        "                // else hold last bit\n",
        "            end else begin\n",
        "                bit_timer <= bit_timer + 1;\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 3. CHAOS & MIXING\n",
        "            // Inject hum into Channel 1 for the sniffer to find (Self-Excitation)\n",
        "            signal_soup[1] <= (signal_soup[1] ^ 32'hDEADBEEF) + fake_mains_hum;\n",
        "            signal_soup[2] <= chaos_seed + 12345;\n",
        "            signal_soup[3] <= signal_soup[2] << 1;\n",
        "            signal_soup[4] <= ~signal_soup[1];\n",
        "            signal_soup[5] <= signal_soup[5] * 3;\n",
        "            signal_soup[6] <= 32'hCAFEBABE;\n",
        "            signal_soup[7] <= signal_soup[0] ^ signal_soup[6];\n",
        "            signal_soup[8] <= signal_soup[8] + 7;\n",
        "            signal_soup[9] <= signal_soup[4] | signal_soup[5];\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 4. UPDATE SEED & TOPOLOGY\n",
        "            chaos_seed <= {{chaos_seed[30:0], chaos_seed[31] ^ chaos_seed[21]}};\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (chaos_seed % 10 == 0) begin\n",
        "                topology_id <= chaos_seed[3:0];\n",
        "            end\n",
        "\n",
        "            // 5. OUTPUT MASK\n",
        "            friend_view_pin <= signal_soup[topology_id % 10] ^ chaos_seed;\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    // --- GRID SNIFFER LOGIC (Running in Parallel) ---\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        if (rst_n) begin\n",
        "            // Detect zero crossings on Channel 1 (where we injected hum)\n",
        "            if (signal_soup[1][31] != last_sign) begin\n",
        "                detected_period <= zero_cross_timer;\n",
        "                zero_cross_timer <= 0;\n",
        "                last_sign <= signal_soup[1][31];\n",
        "\n",
        "                // Adaptive Switching: If period < 450 sim units, assume 60Hz environment\n",
        "                if (detected_period > 0 && detected_period < 450)\n",
        "                    use_60hz_mode <= 1;\n",
        "                else\n",
        "                    use_60hz_mode <= 0;\n",
        "            end else begin\n",
        "                zero_cross_timer <= zero_cross_timer + 1;\n",
        "            end\n",
        "        end\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(*) chaos_seed_debug = chaos_seed;\n",
        "\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\n",
        "module test;\n",
        "    reg clk;\n",
        "    reg rst_n;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] friend_view_pin;\n",
        "    wire [3:0] topology_id;\n",
        "    wire [31:0] chaos_seed_debug;\n",
        "\n",
        "    Ouroboros_Chip uut (.*);\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        clk = 0;\n",
        "        forever #1 clk = ~clk;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial begin\n",
        "        rst_n = 0;\n",
        "        #2 rst_n = 1;\n",
        "        // Run for 60,000 cycles to cover full message transmission\n",
        "        #60000;\n",
        "        $finish;\n",
        "    end\n",
        "\n",
        "    always @(posedge clk) begin\n",
        "        if (rst_n)\n",
        "            $display(\"DATA: %d %d %d\", friend_view_pin, chaos_seed_debug, topology_id);\n",
        "    end\n",
        "endmodule\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(\"chip_japan.sv\", \"w\") as f:\n",
        "    f.write(verilog_code)\n",
        "\n",

      "source": [
        "## Simulate and Decode\n",
        "\n",
        "### Subtask:\n",
        "Run the Verilog simulation for the 'Japan-Patched' chip and use Python to decrypt and demodulate the output to recover the 'HELLO' message.\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "789b446a"
      },
      "source": [
        "**Reasoning**:\n",
        "Run the Verilog simulation, capture the output, and implement the decryption and demodulation logic in Python to recover the 'HELLO' message.\n",
        "\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "d35aca58",
        "outputId": "5b964156-075f-4bdd-e45d-a840ae38d055"
      },
      "source": [
        "import subprocess\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Compile & Run the Simulation\n",
        "print(\"Compiling and Running 'chip_japan.sv'...\")\n",
        "subprocess.run([\"iverilog\", \"-o\", \"chip_japan_sim\", \"chip_japan.sv\"], check=True)\n",
        "process = subprocess.run([\"vvp\", \"chip_japan_sim\"], capture_output=True, text=True)\n",
        "output_lines = process.stdout.splitlines()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Parse Data\n",
        "pins, seeds, topos = [], [], []\n",
        "for line in output_lines:\n",
        "    if line.startswith(\"DATA:\"):\n",
        "        parts = line.split()\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            # Handle 32-bit unsigned/signed conversion if necessary, though Python handles large ints well.\n",
        "            # Verilog %d can be negative, so we mask.\n",
        "            pins.append(int(parts[1]) & 0xFFFFFFFF)\n",
        "            seeds.append(int(parts[2]) & 0xFFFFFFFF)\n",
        "            topos.append(int(parts[3]))\n",
        "        except ValueError: continue\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Decrypt & Filter\n",
        "decoded_signal = []\n",
        "\n",
        "# Decryption logic: pin[i] is generated based on state at i-1.\n",
        "# So we unmask pin[i] using seed[i-1].\n",
        "# Topology filter also applies to the state at generation time.\n",
        "\n",
        "for i in range(1, len(pins)):\n",
        "    pin_val = pins[i]\n",
        "    prev_seed = seeds[i-1]\n",
        "    prev_topo = topos[i-1]\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Unmask\n",
        "    unmasked = pin_val ^ prev_seed\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Filter: Check if Channel 0 was connected\n",
        "    if (prev_topo % 10) == 0:\n",
        "        decoded_val = unmasked\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        # Sample & Hold last valid value\n",
        "        decoded_val = decoded_signal[-1] if decoded_signal else 0\n",
        "\n",
        "    decoded_signal.append(decoded_val)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Demodulate\n",
        "# Sample every 500 cycles, starting offset 250\n",
        "sample_indices = range(250, len(decoded_signal), 500)\n",
        "recovered_bits = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for idx in sample_indices:\n",
        "    if idx < len(decoded_signal):\n",
        "        val = decoded_signal[idx]\n",
        "        # Thresholding: 100 vs 200. Split at 150.\n",
        "        bit = '1' if val > 150 else '0'\n",
        "        recovered_bits.append(bit)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Convert to Text\n",
        "binary_string = \"\".join(recovered_bits)\n",
        "chars = []\n",
        "for i in range(0, len(binary_string), 8):\n",
        "    byte = binary_string[i:i+8]\n",
        "    if len(byte) == 8:\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            chars.append(chr(int(byte, 2)))\n",
        "        except ValueError:\n",
        "            chars.append('?')\n",
        "\n",
        "final_text = \"\".join(chars)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"Recovered Binary: {binary_string}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Recovered Text: {final_text}\")"
      ],
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Compiling and Running 'chip_japan.sv'...\n",
            "Recovered Binary: 010010000100010101001100010011000100111111111111111111111111\n",
            "Recovered Text: HELLOÿÿ\n"
          ]
        }
      ]

      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# Helper to convert unsigned 32-bit to signed for plotting\n",
        "def to_signed(val):\n",
        "    if val > 0x7FFFFFFF:\n",
        "        return val - 0x100000000\n",
        "    return val\n",
        "\n",
        "# Prepare data for plotting\n",
        "plot_range = 2000\n",
        "raw_signed = [to_signed(p) for p in pins[:plot_range]]\n",
        "decoded_plot = decoded_signal[:plot_range]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Create Figure\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 12), dpi=100)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Subplot 1: Raw Chaos\n",
        "plt.subplot(3, 1, 1)\n",
        "plt.plot(raw_signed, color='red', alpha=0.6, linewidth=0.8)\n",
        "plt.title('Stage 1: The \"Friend\" View (Raw Chaos + Adaptive Hum)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='darkred')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Signal Value (Signed)')\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Subplot 2: Decoded Signal\n",
        "plt.subplot(3, 1, 2)\n",
        "plt.plot(decoded_plot, color='lime', linewidth=1.5, label='Decrypted Signal')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Overlay Sample Points\n",
        "valid_indices = [i for i in sample_indices if i < plot_range]\n",
        "valid_samples = [decoded_signal[i] for i in valid_indices]\n",
        "plt.scatter(valid_indices, valid_samples, color='red', marker='x', s=40, zorder=5, label='Sampling Points')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Stage 2: Decrypted & Filtered Payload', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='green')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Signal Level')\n",
        "plt.legend(loc='upper right')\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Subplot 3: Recovered Bits & Text\n",
        "plt.subplot(3, 1, 3)\n",
        "# Create a step-like signal for bits\n",
        "bit_waveform = []\n",
        "for i in range(plot_range):\n",
        "    # Find which bit index corresponds to time i\n",
        "    # We sampled at 250, 750, 1250... Bit duration is 500.\n",
        "    bit_idx = i // 500\n",
        "    if bit_idx < len(recovered_bits):\n",
        "        bit_waveform.append(int(recovered_bits[bit_idx]))\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        bit_waveform.append(0)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.step(range(plot_range), bit_waveform, where='mid', color='blue', linewidth=2)\n",
        "plt.title('Stage 3: Final Recovered Digital Output', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='navy')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Logic State')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Clock Cycles')\n",
        "plt.yticks([0, 1])\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Annotate Characters\n",
        "# Each char is 8 bits * 500 cycles = 4000 cycles.\n",
        "# We are plotting 2000 cycles, so likely only part of 'H' (bits 0-7, cycles 0-4000).\n",
        "# Actually, let's annotate the bits themselves or the char if it fits.\n",
        "# Since we show 2000 cycles, that is 4 bits. 'H' is 01001000.\n",
        "# The first 4 bits are 0, 1, 0, 0.\n",
        "for b_idx in range(min(len(recovered_bits), 4)):\n",
        "    x_pos = b_idx * 500 + 250\n",
        "    bit_val = recovered_bits[b_idx]\n",
        "    plt.text(x_pos, 0.5, f\"Bit {b_idx}\\n'{bit_val}'\", ha='center', va='center', color='black', fontweight='bold', bbox=dict(facecolor='white', alpha=0.7))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"

      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Parse Output Lines (Re-using output_lines from previous step)\n",
        "# We ensure fresh parsing to guarantee alignment.\n",
        "pins, seeds, topos = [], [], []\n",
        "if 'output_lines' in locals():\n",
        "    for line in output_lines:\n",
        "        if line.startswith(\"DATA:\"):\n",
        "            parts = line.split()\n",
        "            try:\n",
        "                pins.append(int(parts[1]) & 0xFFFFFFFF)\n",
        "                seeds.append(int(parts[2]) & 0xFFFFFFFF)\n",
        "                topos.append(int(parts[3]))\n",
        "            except ValueError:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Error: output_lines not found. Please run the simulation step first.\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Decrypt & Filter (Corrected Lag Logic)\n",
        "decoded_signal = []\n",
        "# We start from i=1 because pin[i] depends on state at i-1\n",
        "for i in range(1, len(pins)):\n",
        "    pin_val = pins[i]\n",
        "    prev_seed = seeds[i-1]\n",
        "    prev_topo = topos[i-1]\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Decrypt\n",
        "    unmasked = pin_val ^ prev_seed\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Filter: Check if Channel 0 was connected in the PREVIOUS cycle\n",
        "    if (prev_topo % 10) == 0:\n",
        "        decoded_val = unmasked\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        # Sample & Hold last valid value\n",
        "        decoded_val = decoded_signal[-1] if decoded_signal else 0\n",
        "\n",
        "    decoded_signal.append(decoded_val)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Demodulate\n",
        "# Sample every 500 cycles, starting offset 250\n",
        "sample_indices = range(250, len(decoded_signal), 500)\n",
        "recovered_bits = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for idx in sample_indices:\n",
        "    if idx < len(decoded_signal):\n",
        "        val = decoded_signal[idx]\n",
        "        # Thresholding\n",
        "        bit = '1' if val > 150 else '0'\n",
        "        recovered_bits.append(bit)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Convert to Text & Remove Artifacts\n",
        "binary_string = \"\".join(recovered_bits)\n",
        "chars = []\n",
        "clean_bits_len = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "for i in range(0, len(binary_string), 8):\n",
        "    byte_str = binary_string[i:i+8]\n",
        "    if len(byte_str) == 8:\n",
        "        byte_val = int(byte_str, 2)\n",
        "        if byte_val == 0xFF:\n",
        "            # Stop or skip 0xFF (idle artifact)\n",
        "            break\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            chars.append(chr(byte_val))\n",
        "            clean_bits_len += 8\n",
        "        except ValueError:\n",
        "            chars.append('?')\n",
        "\n",
        "final_text_clean = \"\".join(chars)\n",
        "print(f\"Recovered Binary (Raw): {binary_string}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Cleaned Recovered Text: {final_text_clean}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Visualize\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 12), dpi=100)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Helper for signed conversion\n",
        "def to_signed(val):\n",
        "    if val > 0x7FFFFFFF:\n",
        "        return val - 0x100000000\n",
        "    return val\n",
        "\n",
        "# Panel 1: Raw Chaos\n",
        "plot_len = min(4000, len(pins))\n",
        "raw_signed = [to_signed(p) for p in pins[:plot_len]]\n",
        "plt.subplot(3, 1, 1)\n",
        "plt.plot(raw_signed, color='red', alpha=0.6, linewidth=0.5)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Layer 1: Raw Chaos & Adaptive Hum\", color='darkred', fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Signed Value\")\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Panel 2: Decoded Payload\n",
        "decoded_plot = decoded_signal[:plot_len]\n",
        "plt.subplot(3, 1, 2)\n",
        "plt.plot(decoded_plot, color='lime', linewidth=1.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Overlay markers\n",
        "valid_indices = [i for i in sample_indices if i < plot_len]\n",

        "# Create step waveform for the CLEAN bits only\n",
        "bit_waveform = []\n",
        "# Map time to bit value\n",
        "for i in range(plot_len):\n",
        "    bit_idx = i // 500\n",
        "    if bit_idx < len(recovered_bits):\n",
